# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-app
  namespace: production
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-app
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: web-app
          image: your-registry/web-app:latest
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
          env:
            - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
              value: memcached
            - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
              value: "11211"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
  namespace: production
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: memcached
          image: memcached:1.6-alpine
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - containerPort: 11211
          args:
            - "-m"
            - "64"
            - "-o"
            - "modern"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 50m
              memory: 64Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 128Mi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-worker
  namespace: production
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: background-worker
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: background-worker
          image: your-registry/background-worker:latest
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          env:
            - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
              value: memcached
            - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
              value: "11211"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    app: memcached
  ports:
    - name: memcached
      port: 11211
      targetPort: 11211
  type: ClusterIP
